project.next_production_action: Maintain regression, reviewer, and deployment evidence; no blocking action recorded.

evidence_file_plan.purpose: Shows desktop rendering of the real project surface.
Shows mobile rendering of the real project surface.

execution_steps: Open the live project surface and run a representative non-sample action.

Run a hosted-route smoke check and save the JSON result.
